# manager: paru | layer: 4 | packages: 17

bat  # Alternative `cat`
fd  # Alternative `find`
github-cli  # Github commands
lazygit  # TUI for git
neovim-git  # neovim built from upstream git master (AUR); first concrete AUR package
pastel  # color utility
pueue  # task queue daemon
ripgrep  # grep alternative
rsync
skim  # fzf alternative written in Rust
starship  # zsh prompt theme manager
tealdeer  # tldr alternative
tmux  # tmux multiplexer
tree-sitter
